nasb.text: The priest shall next offer the sin offering and make atonement for the one to be cleansed from his uncleanness. Then afterward, he shall slaughter the burnt offering.

esv.text: The priest shall offer the sin offering, to make atonement for him who is to be cleansed from his uncleanness. And afterward he shall kill the burnt offering.

cnv.text: 祭司要獻贖罪祭，為那得潔淨的人贖罪，使他脫離污穢，然後宰殺燔祭牲。

ccb.text: 祭司要献上赎罪祭，为求洁净者赎罪。然后，祭司要宰杀燔祭牲，
